title: Dual Defense
effect: When you wield two weapons, you are trained in Speed defense tasks. Enabler. Dual Distraction (1+ Speed points): When you wield two weapons, your opponent’s next attack is hindered, and if you apply Effort on your next attack against that same foe, you get a free level of Effort on the task. Enabler.
details: When you wield two weapons, you are trained in Speed defense tasks. Enabler.
